name: orbit_wars
title: Orbit Wars
description: Conquer planets rotating around a black hole in a continuous space.

agentTimeout.description: Obsolete field kept for backwards compatibility, please use observation.remainingOverageTime.

shipSpeed.description: Flight speed of ships per turn.

blackHoleRadius.description: Radius of the black hole event horizon.

reward.description: Score at the end of the game.

planets.description: List of planets: [id, x, y, radius, owner, ships]

fleets.description: List of active fleets: [id, owner, from_planet_id, to_planet_id, x, y, ships]

action.description: List of moves to make. Each move is [from_planet_id, direction_angle, num_ships]
